question: List the sub-district names, ordered alphabetically, that contain at least one sector categorized as 'Rural' and at least one sector categorized as 'Urban'.

SELECT DISTINCT dl.sub_district_name
FROM dim_location dl
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_establishment_totals fet
    JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id

)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM fact_establishment_totals fet
    JOIN dim_sector_category dsc ON fet.sector_id = dsc.sector_id
    WHERE fet.location_id = dl.location_id
    AND dsc.sector_category ILIKE 'Urban'
)
ORDER BY dl.sub_district_name;
